description: Dynamic hot themes with 12-18 month lifecycle. Separated from evergreen taxonomy so HBM/液冷/硅光 don't pollute the long-term tree.

themes.label: HBM
themes.evidence: AI training memory bottleneck; SK海力士/MU/Samsung supply chain

themes.label: 液冷

themes.label: AI PC
themes.evidence: Intel/Qualcomm/AMD NPU PC 周期；2026 量产

themes.label: 核电重估
themes.evidence: Hyperscaler PPA + SMR 监管开闸

themes.label: 硅光
themes.evidence: AI 集群高带宽光互连，区分于 InP 接口
